COUNTER.Title: Counters
COUNTER.NoCounters: No counters yet. Hold the 'Alt' key and click '+' to create one.
COUNTER.DeleteConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to delete this counter?
COUNTER.Name: Name
COUNTER.KeyHint: Unique identifier for expressions (letters, numbers, underscore only)
COUNTER.StatesRequired: At least one state is required
COUNTER.ExpressionHint: Roll expression. Use @counters.key for other counters and @attributes… for actor data (e.g. @counters.rage + @attributes.hp.value).
COUNTER.KeyExists: A counter with that key already exists
COUNTER.ResetConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to clear all counters for yourself and your controlled tokens? This cannot be undone.
